title: A/C Compressor Thermal Protector Removal and Installation

blocks.text: A/C Compressor Thermal Protector Removal and Installation
Disconnect the coupler (A) and remove the harness clip (B).

Remove the holder (A) and remove the harness clip (B). Disconnect the connector (C) and remove the thermal protector (D). Remove silicone sealant from the thermal protector mounting area of the compressor.
Apply silicone sealant to the temperature-sensitive part of the thermal protector. (Silicon sealant: Shin-Etsu Chemical KE-347W) Application volume: around 0.15g (about 10mm in diameter)

items: When applying silicone sealant, be very careful not to adhere to the terminals of surrounding switches and couplers. Also, do not touch the terminals of switches and couplers with hands or gloves that have silicon sealant adhered to them.

blocks.text: Attach the thermal protector (A) and install the holder (B). Connect connector (C) and attach harness clip (D).
Connect the coupler (A) and attach the harness clip (B).
